description_long: This chapel is a compact religious building with a central domed structure topped by a gold cross, flanked by two symmetrical wings and a prominent bell tower on one side. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely plaster or painted stone, with a series of rectangular windows featuring brown frames. The main dome is dark gray and ribbed, while the roofs of the wings and bell tower are similarly colored but with a more angular, tiled appearance. The bell tower is cylindrical, capped with a smaller dome and a gold finial, and features arched openings near the top. The building sits on a polygonal base that resembles a paved courtyard or plaza. Architectural details are minimal but precise, with clean lines and a balanced, harmonious layout typical of Eastern Orthodox or Neo-Classical chapels.
description: A small, domed chapel with a bell tower, light-colored walls, dark gray roofs, and gold crosses, set on a polygonal paved base. The design is symmetrical and features rectangular windows and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the chapel with the bell tower and the main dome, showing the polygonal base and the arrangement of the wings.
description_view_1: The front view displays the symmetrical facade with three main sections, the central dome, and the entrance flanked by two wings.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the opposite side of the bell tower, showing the rear and side elevations of the chapel and the relationship between the domed roof and the wings.
description_view_3: The rear view centers on the bell tower and the back of the chapel, with the main dome rising behind and the polygonal base clearly visible.
attribute_steeple_or_bell_tower: Present; the bell tower is cylindrical, attached to one side of the chapel, topped with a small dome and a gold finial, and features arched openings near the top.
attribute_entrance_door_design: The main entrance door is rectangular, likely made of wood, and finished in a brown color. It is simple in design, with no visible ornate carvings or decorative elements.
